name: freelancer using Upwork processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancer using Upwork processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent payment tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation instead of manual invoicing through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent payment tracking leads to cash flow gaps.
